/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libxiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libxiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/xiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xiaox_interfaces/srv/detail/init_device__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/xiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xiaox_interfaces/srv/detail/read_joints__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/xiaox_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/xiaox_interfaces/srv/detail/write_joints__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
